'''Gefferon Pleasure Craft''' was a manufacturer of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] pleasurecraft such as [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barges]]. Their premier model of this type was the [[Eclipse (sail barge)|Eclipse]] sail barge. Gefferon also produced the [[Nimbus Rider 2000]].
